oneClientHpPercent.AltName: Enemy maximum HP correction when 1 client

oneClientHpDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy HP damage correction for 1 client

oneClientAilmentDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy resistance damage correction for 1 client

oneClientStaminaDamagePercent.AltName: When there is 1 client, the amount of stamina taken from the enemy is corrected.

oneClientPoiseDamagePercent.AltName: When there is 1 client, enemy strength reduction value correction

oneClientStunDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy stun value correction when 1 client

twoClientsHpPercent.AltName: Enemy maximum HP correction when 2 clients

twoClientsHpDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy HP damage correction for 2 clients

twoClientsAilmentDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy resistance damage correction for 2 clients

twoClientsStaminaDamagePercent.AltName: When there are 2 clients, the amount of stamina taken from the enemy is corrected.

twoClientsPoiseDamagePercent.AltName: When there are 2 clients, enemy toughness machining value correction

twoClientsStunDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy stun value correction when 2 clients

threeClientsHpPercent.AltName: Enemy maximum HP correction when 3 clients

threeClientsHpDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy HP damage correction for 3 clients

threeClientsAilmentDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy resistance damage correction for 3 clients

threeClientsStaminaDamagePercent.AltName: When there are 3 clients, the amount of stamina taken from the enemy is corrected.

threeClientsPoiseDamagePercent.AltName: When there are 3 clients, enemy strength reduction value correction

threeClientsStunDamagePercent.AltName: Enemy stun value correction when 3 clients
